pages.title: Your First Day
pages.text: Spawn, then $(rune)move with purpose$(). Daylight is short and the first night decides a lot.$(br2)$(gold)1.$() Punch wood, make tools, grab food.$(br)$(gold)2.$() Find a $(rune)village$() — beds, safety, a $(gold)Hunter Board$().$(br)$(gold)3.$() Take a $(em)low-rank contract$() you can survive.$(br)$(gold)4.$() Clear it, return alive, get $(rune)evaluated$().

pages.name: Night Brings Teeth
pages.text: When the sun drops, the dark fills with things that were once people — and shadows that never were. Carry $(gold)light$(), keep your back to a wall, and do not wander far before you are ready.

pages.title: Light Pushes Back
pages.text: A torch is the cheapest life-insurance in the realm. Mark your path, ring your camp, and never dig straight down toward a sound.

pages.title: Where To Go Next
pages.text: Once you can survive a night and a road, read the $(gold)Hunter Boards$() and $(gold)Guild$() chapters — they explain ranks, contracts, and how the realm keeps score.$(br2)$(soft)Tip: press $(gold)L$(soft) for your Quest Log.$()
